reviews.review_description: it loads up OK but I can’t get anything to work the colors on the Turner Terrio I can hardly read them and my pointer doesn’t work to pick things to play the game. Hope you can do something about it. I’d like to try one of the motorcycles and get on the track. I love my speed racing and it’s great and simple to play. I’m 88 years old and have to play sitting all the time. Thanks again keep up the good work love my uncle quest two
Goes to first screen and thats it

developer_response.body:
Hi,
Please activate the controllers by clicking a button. You can then navigate through the menu with the thumbsticks.

reviews.review_description: Just started playing but love it so far.

reviews.review_title: This games is pretty good so far
reviews.review_description: Really dig it. Been playing it for awhile and it makes for some good fun. Would like better braking though in a future update 🤘

This was not very good.. The AI looked like they were having fun though! 

The concept is great and I really want to see this evolve into something, but right now it’s not really playable. 
Would love to be more constructive, but at this point there is just too much to work on…

Cool game with big potential.   It needs instructions on when to shift and when to lean etc...  for those of us who have never driven a cycle or a car that you have to shift.  

The leaning of the cycle is the toughest part.  

COOL but needs work. Many times when you try to get on the cycle it will not allow you to get close enough to get on, other times it works fine.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback. I'll update the instructions to be more specific.
As for the not being able to get on the bike, try recentering your position with the right oculus button.

reviews.review_description: I have been waiting for a bike racing game forever so I am buying this in support that it will become amazing in the future. P.S I need huge jumps and tons of loops ;) lol

reviews.review_title: Great little game. Basic but fun
reviews.review_description: Great game for the price. It’s pretty bare bones but it’s very fun to play. Would love to see an online multiplayer element to it. I wouldn’t say it’s a sim more arcade like but it’s a great start. Hope it keeps getting updates
whenever I get on it it won't let me click start 10 seconds later my headset crashes

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear that.
It works for nearly everyone else, so I don't really know what the problem could be.
If you have not tried the update, see if that works for you.
Let us know how you get on.

Thanks.

reviews.review_description: This app won’t work in my oculus 3

developer_response.body:
Not correct.
The game does work on Quest 3.
I don't know why it has not worked on yours but it is not the fault of the game.

reviews.review_description: You can’t see your controllers you can’t start a race why fix the game please

developer_response.body:
Hi,
Please activate the controllers by clicking any button. You can then navigate through the menu with the thumbsticks and using buttons to select e.g. start game.

reviews.review_description: Overall it’s a good game but can you add people on the the bike though and I’m not talking about the bots you race I mean the driver if you could add that but great game.
Good starting point but needs a lot of work to get the physics of the steering down along with breaking and down shifting.

developer_response.body: Thank for the feedback, will continue to try to make improvements on these points.
